notes: Recognizable as the same squid in pose and orientation but the two long feeding tentacles are missing, the arm fan is collapsed into a clumped mass, and the linework is too sparse and noisy to read as a proper FAO plate.
specific_issues: both long feeding tentacles from the photo are missing
arms are clumped together instead of splayed in the photo's star/fan arrangement
fin profile is rounded and lacks the photo's pointed diamond shape
stippling is scattered noise rather than concentrated chromatophore fields
eye reduced to a tiny dot — no almond outline or defined pupil
no ring suckers indicated along the arms
outline has small breaks/jaggedness around the mantle and arm edges
interior is mostly empty white with no coherent shading structure
